SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.common

Class Result.Success<T,E extends Throwable>

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.common.Result<T,E>
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.common.Result.Success<T,E>
Type Parameters:
T - the type of the value in a successful result
E - the type of the error in a failed result
Enclosing class:
Result<T,E extends Throwable>
public static final class Result.Success<T,E extends Throwable> extends Result<T,E>
Represents a successful result containing a value of type T.

This class is a concrete subclass of Result and is used to indicate that an operation has completed successfully. It contains a single field, value, which holds the successful result.

Instances of this class can be created using the static factory method Result.success(Object).

The class also provides methods to access the value, check for success, and perform operations on the value.

The class is generic, allowing it to be used with any type of value T and any type of error E.
